title: LinguaLayer Language Pair Dataset Schema
description: Defines the metadata structure for a multilingual dataset registered in the LinguaLayer Dataset Registry. Version 403.

dataset_id.description: On-chain dataset ID assigned by the Dataset Registry contract

language_pair.description: Language pair in arrow notation, e.g. EN->SW

source_language.description: BCP-47 language tag for the source language

target_language.description: BCP-47 language tag for the target language

domain.description: Subject domain of the dataset — used for pricing and search filtering

contributor.description: Stellar address of the primary contributor (Strkey G... format)

ipfs_cid.description: IPFS CIDv1 content identifier for the full dataset file

string_count.description: Number of translated string pairs in this dataset

license_price_xlm.description: License price in XLM stroops (1 XLM = 10,000,000 stroops)

reviewers.description: Stellar addresses of peer reviewers who attested accuracy

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp of last on-chain update
